meaning: n.厚平板,厚片,混凝土路面,板层v.把...分成厚片,用石板铺
examples: Slab pull happens at the subduction zone.
Once the ocean plate begins to sink, it would be affected by another force—slab pull.
At the CBI Denver Crime Lab, technicians shake out the items in a sterile room, onto a large, white slab covered with paper.
Volume V, containing entries from slab through zydeco, was published today by Harvard University Press.
Two cases are pending, and in January Marble Slab won the third, which is on appeal.
